Description.description: External service intake request submitted through Power Pages or internal channels.
Approval state for routed requests that require manager review.
Approval state for routed requests that require manager review.
Internal user who approved the request.
Date and time when the request was approved.
Category lookup used to route and report on service requests, backed by Contoso service category reference data.
System-generated identifier shown to the requester after portal submission and used for follow-up tracking.
Detailed explanation of the requester issue or need.
Date and time when the request was synchronized to the external ERP system.
External ERP synchronization state.
External ERP synchronization state.
Identifier returned by the simulated external ERP API after successful sync.
Staff-only resolution notes hidden from external portal users.
Authenticated portal contact that submitted the request; used for contact-scoped portal security.
Email address supplied by the requester for intake confirmations and follow-up messages.
Target date and time for final resolution.
Coordinator-entered explanation of how the request was resolved; required with meaningful detail before closing high-severity requests.
Target date and time for first response.
Dataverse owner team assigned by the matched routing and SLA rule.
Routing and SLA rule matched when the request was submitted or updated.
Unique identifier for entity instances
Impact level selected for triage and high-severity approval routing.
Resolution target in hours copied from the matched routing and SLA rule.
Current processing state used by coordinators, approvals, and closure validation.
Source channel for the service request, defaulting to Portal for Power Pages submissions.
Short requester-provided summary of the service request.
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Date and time that the record was migrated.
Owner Id
Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record
Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.
Unique identifier for the user that owns the record.
Status of the Service Request
Status of the Service Request
Reason for the status of the Service Request
Reason for the status of the Service Request
For internal use only.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
